**Page URL**
The Epic Games documentation URL that failed.

**Error from scraper output**
```
Paste the relevant line from the scraper log
```

**Is this page in FAILURES.md?**
- [ ] Yes — already listed as a known failure
- [ ] No — this is a new failure

**UE version**
Which version were you scraping? (e.g. 5.7, 5.8)
